# HSD 22021604765: [OKS][DMR][x1-a0][fused] : Thermal Monitor log bit inconsistency observed with 0x19c with temperature greater than  T_Throttle

## Root Cause Summary

Injecting temperature to core greater than T_Throttle does not set Thermal Log/Status bit on MSR 0x19C (IA32_THERM_STATUS). Frequency is observed to be clipped to 400(Pm)

Steps followed:

1. T_THROTTLE is 100 on CBB

2.
 sv.socket0.cbb0.compute1.pma10.pmsb.dfvfcr_dts_fuse_0.cr_reg36_inst.digthermovrdval
=0x14c (102)

3. Read MSR,  0x19C, do not see Thermal log bit or status bit being set. No frequency clip observed

[root@dmr-bkc ~]# rdmsr -a 0x19c

CPU 0: 88282800

4. Increased 
sv.socket0.cbb

### Description
Injecting temperature to core greater than T_Throttle does not set Thermal Log/Status bit on MSR 0x19C (IA32_THERM_STATUS). Frequency is observed to be clipped to 400(Pm)

Steps followed:

1. T_THROTTLE is 100 on CBB

2.
 sv.socket0.cbb0.compute1.pma10.pmsb.dfvfcr_dts_fuse_0.cr_reg36_inst.digthermovrdval
=0x14c (102)

3. Read MSR,  0x19C, do not see Thermal log bit or status bit being set. No frequency clip observed

[root@dmr-bkc ~]# rdmsr -a 0x19c

CPU 0: 88282800

4. Increased 
sv.socket0.cbb0.compute1.pma10.pmsb.dfvfcr_dts_fuse_0.cr_reg36_inst.digthermovrdval 
to 0x159

sv.socket0.cbb0.compute1.pma10.pmsb.dfvfcr_dts_fuse_0.cr_reg36_inst.digthermovrdval=0x159

5. Observed frequency clipped to 400 and PEM Status showing Per Core Thermal bit set,
 Bit 23 - Per Core Thermal

6. MSRs 0x19c and 0x1b1 does not show thermal log or thermal status bit being set
